prompt: Build a premium healthcare website inspired by FitLife - Your Fitness Companion. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.

files.content:
FitLife
Programs Features Pricing Help
Programs Features Pricing Help
Fitness Tracking

Transform Your
Body & Mind

Personalized workouts, nutrition plans, and 24/7 coaching. Track progress with AI. Reach fitness goals faster.

500K+

Members

90%

Success Rate

Fitness Programs

Strength Building

Build muscle with personalized weightlifting routines. Progressive overload tracking.

  • 4-8 week programs
  • Video guidance

Cardio & Endurance

Improve stamina with HIIT, running, and cycling. Low-impact options available.

  • 12-week program
  • Music playlists

Yoga & Flexibility

Increase flexibility, reduce stress. Classes for all levels.

  • Daily classes
  • Meditation

What You Get

AI Progress Tracking

Real-time metrics. Photos, weights, measurements. Visual progress.

Nutrition Guidance

Custom meal plans. Macro tracking. Grocery lists.

Live Coaching

Group classes daily. 1-on-1 coaching available.

Community Support

Join challenges. Share progress. Get motivation.

Membership Plans

Choose your fitness journey

Basic

$9.99/mo

  • Workout library
  • Progress tracking
POPULAR

Premium

$29.99/mo

  • All Basic +
  • Personalized plans
  • Live classes

Pro

$59.99/mo

  • All Premium +
  • 1-on-1 coaching
  • Nutrition plan

Questions?

Yes, cancel anytime no questions asked. Your subscription ends immediately.
No, we have bodyweight, home, and gym programs. Choose what fits your situation.

7-day free trial. No credit card.
